Instruction: REGISTER VIEWER REFERENCE (set SW[2:0]=1 0 1 after program halts)
Use SW[9:5] to select register. All values fit in lower 24 bits — SW[3] upper byte always shows 00.
HOW TO USE THIS TEST ON FPGA:
1. Copy reg_viewer_test.hex to program.hex in the Quartus project root and recompile
3. Step through all 31 ADDI instructions with KEY[1]
4. When LEDR[1] lights (halt loop reached) all registers are loaded
6. Use SW[9:5] to select any register — display must match the table above
7. RULE: every register xN must show its own number N on the display
